text.title: Research Frameworks Router Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Research Frameworks Router. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent emits 'we will use TAM/SAM/SOM + Lean Canvas + JTBD'.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated frameworks as additive instead of as alternatives.
antipattern.fix: Reject multi-pick; force one pick per goal; rejected list captures alternatives.

antipattern.symptom: TAM/SAM/SOM picked for a scale-stage product with $50M ARR.
antipattern.root-cause: Stage tag ignored at pick time.
antipattern.fix: Make stage a required field; veto frameworks misaligned with stage.

antipattern.symptom: Decision-record says 'use Porter' without naming a methodology slug.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote prose instead of a structured pick.
antipattern.fix: Require picked_slug to match an existing methodology slug exactly.
